error_signature: Invalid URL: An explicit scheme (such as https) must be provided
title: Stripe Trigger requires explicit URL scheme
symptom: When attempting to publish a workflow with the Stripe Trigger node, an error states 'Invalid URL: An explicit scheme (such as https) must be provided'. This prevents the workflow from being activated.
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly formatted with a scheme
Using a different node that does not require a scheme
root_cause: The Stripe Trigger node requires that the webhook URL includes an explicit scheme (http or https). If the URL is missing this scheme, the node cannot function correctly, leading to activation errors.
fix_steps: Check the webhook URL in your n8n configuration.
Ensure that the URL starts with 'https://'.
Update the URL in your Docker compose file if necessary.
Save the changes and try to publish the workflow again.
agent_instruction: Ensure the webhook URL includes 'https://' and save the configuration.
